BCFPM_w063_LatchSwitchError.d: latch feedback switches are most likely harnessed incorrectly.
BCFPM_w063_LatchSwitchError.m: Door latch status is incorrectly reported and PFD operation becomes erratic

BCFPM_w064_LatchReleaseError.d: Check alertLog for more information. If resultingState is CLOSED_BRAKE, the latch's OPEN switch may be disconnected. If previousState is OPENED_BRAKE, the latch's switches and release motor may be all

BCFPM_w065_ratchetingDetected.m: Worse user experience as the door

BCFPM_w066_falseLatchCinch.d: Not to be confused with a weak cinch. This alert does not imply problems with seal load or door alignment.
BCFPM_w066_falseLatchCinch.m: Front door may not be able to cinch closed

BCFPM_w067_missedShortDrop.d: The body controller will automatically re-issue a short-drop command if a failure to drop is detected.
BCFPM_w067_missedShortDrop.m: Window may briefly catch on body frame as door opens

BCFPM_w068_missedUndrop.d: The body controller will automatically re-issue an undrop command if a failure to undrop is detected.
BCFPM_w068_missedUndrop.m: Window undrop will be delayed by about 1000 ms as the door closes.

BCFPM_w069_LatchStatusIgnored.d: This alert probably indicates that a firmware bug was encountered. Resetting the front door body controller will temporarily resolve the issue.
BCFPM_w069_LatchStatusIgnored.m: Vehicle will not properly detect that the door is open or closing. May also trigger several other power front door alerts.

BCFPM_w074_NoLatchEntryOnClose.d: The Body Controller Front Driver Door (BCFDM) or Body Controller Front Passenger Door (BCFPM) detects latch is not fully closed after ramping.
BCFPM_w074_NoLatchEntryOnClose.m: Door will not close properly. If vehicle is locked, alarm may sound.

BCFPM_w077_LatchMechReleaseStuck.d: Often caused by a kinked release cable or damaged cable tubing.
BCFPM_w077_LatchMechReleaseStuck.m: Front door may not properly close

BCFPM_w078_DoorUnzeroed.d: The door zero position is cleared.
BCFPM_w078_DoorUnzeroed.m: The door power operation is disabled.

BCFPM_w079_DvrSideCfgMismatch.d: reseting the controller should fix the issue.
BCFPM_w079_DvrSideCfgMismatch.m: controller may have behaviors that correspond with the wrong side of the car

BCFPM_w080_CurrentDropOut.m: Actuator will temporarily not respond to being driven

BCFPM_w081_LatchOpenInMotion.d: This alert helps to indicate if the latch has water ingress which has damaged or caused undesired behaviors for the vehicle.
BCFPM_w081_LatchOpenInMotion.m: Door may be unlatched while vehicle is in motion.

BCFPM_w083_UnexpectedStop.d: The door stopped unexpectedly while opening or closing.
BCFPM_w083_UnexpectedStop.m: Door opening or closing actuation did not complete.

BCFPM_w090_CrashUnlockError.m: These are the repercussions of the alert being set

BCFPM_w091_CrashStateMismatch.m: If any crash signal is active, crash behavior is active

BCFPM_w093_OTPError.m: Genealogy information may not be read.

BCFPM_w105_ECUDebugMode.d: Production vehicle should not have Debug Jumper in place. Remove jumper from ECU.
BCFPM_w105_ECUDebugMode.m: ECU Debug Jumper will disable SBC watchdog, preventing external watchdog reset protection.

BCFPM_w106_HighCPULoad.d: Log contains CPU load for each task.
BCFPM_w106_HighCPULoad.m: High CPU load can indicate ineffecient code.

BCFPM_w107_HighStackUsage.d: Log contains stack usage for each task.
BCFPM_w107_HighStackUsage.m: Stack overflow can occur if there is not enough stack space.

BMSSEMI_a004_ChargeFailure.d: A vehicle condition has been detected while charging or attempting to charge.

BMSSEMI_a034_SocImbalance.d: Battery Management System Semi (BMSSEMI) detects a state of charge (SOC) imbalance due to a difference in SOC of brick with max SOC and brick with min SOC exceeds the maximum SOC imbalance threshold.
BMSSEMI_a034_SocImbalance.m: Reduced range while driving and reduced energy added while charging.

BMSSEMI_a035_SocImbalanceWarning.d: This alert is an early warning for SocImbalance. It triggers with a lower threshold than SocImbalance.

BMSSEMI_a036_SocChange.d: Battery Management System Semi (BMSSEMI) detects a change in state of charge (SOC) of more than 3% based on state of charge by open circuit voltage (SocByOcv) occurred while the vehicle was not in use
BMSSEMI_a036_SocChange.m: Significant change in displayed SOC on the User Interface (UI).

BMSSEMI_a037_SocHighAhError.d: An SocByAh saturation of 3% occurred while State of Charge (SOC) saturation was active.
BMSSEMI_a037_SocHighAhError.m: Battery Management System Semi (BMSSEMI) likely overestimates SOC of some bricks due to incorrect Calculated Amp-hour Capacity (CAC) or Coulomb counti

BMSSEMI_a039_CacChange.m: This alert is for informational purpose only.

BMS_d269_highVoltageFuseABlown.m: Vehicle is unable to start, drive, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d270_hvpCommsLost.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has lost communication with the High Voltage Processor (HVP).
BMS_d270_hvpCommsLost.m: Vehicle is unable to start, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d271_batteryPackSensorFailure.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected a non-serviceable internal hardware condition on one or more Battery Management Boards (BMB).

BMS_d272_batteryPackSensorCommsLost.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected a loss of communication between the battery pack sensor module and one or more Battery Management Boards (BMB).

BMS_d273_vcFrontCommsLost.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has lost communication with the Front Vehicle Controller (VCFront).

BMS_d274_packCurrentSensorACircuitFailur.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected that the shunt is no longer able to provide full functionality due to a current sensor circuit issue.
BMS_d274_packCurrentSensorACircuitFailur.m: Vehicle is unable to support the low voltage system and unable to start drive or charge.

BMS_d275_packPosContactorACircuitFailure.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the positive pack contactor has fallen open even though it was requested to be closed due to a circuit issue.
BMS_d275_packPosContactorACircuitFailure.m: Vehicle is unable to start, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d276_packPosContactorAStuckClosed.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the positive pack contactor is stuck closed.
BMS_d276_packPosContactorAStuckClosed.m: Vehicle may not be able to sleep.

BMS_d277_packNegContactorACircuitFailure.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the negative pack contactor has fallen open even though it was requested to be closed due to a circuit issue.
BMS_d277_packNegContactorACircuitFailure.m: Vehicle is unable to start, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d278_packNegContactorAStuckClosed.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the negative pack contactor is stuck closed.
BMS_d278_packNegContactorAStuckClosed.m: Vehicle may not be able to sleep.

BMS_d279_fastChargePosContactorACircuitF.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the positive fast charge contactor has fallen open even though it was requested to be closed due to a circuit issue.
BMS_d279_fastChargePosContactorACircuitF.m: Vehicle is unable to charge and may be unable to start or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d280_fastChargePosContactorAStuckClo.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the positive fast charge contactor is stuck closed.
BMS_d280_fastChargePosContactorAStuckClo.m: Vehicle is unable to charge and may be unable to start or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d281_fastChargePosContactorAStuckOpe.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the positive fast charge contactor is stuck open.
BMS_d281_fastChargePosContactorAStuckOpe.m: Vehicle is unable to charge and may be unable to start or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d282_fastChargeNegContactorACircuitF.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the negative fast charge contactor has fallen open even though it was requested to be closed due to a circuit issue.
BMS_d282_fastChargeNegContactorACircuitF.m: Vehicle is unable to charge and may be unable to start or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d283_fastChargeNegContactorAStuckClo.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the negative fast charge contactor is stuck closed.
BMS_d283_fastChargeNegContactorAStuckClo.m: Vehicle is unable to charge and may be unable to start or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d284_fastChargeNegContactorAStuckOpe.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the negative fast charge contactor is stuck open.
BMS_d284_fastChargeNegContactorAStuckOpe.m: Vehicle is unable to charge and may be unable to start or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d285_packVoltageSensorACircuitFailur.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected an issue with its pack voltage sense capability due to a circuit issue.
BMS_d285_packVoltageSensorACircuitFailur.m: Vehicle is unable to start, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d286_dcLinkVoltageHigh.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected an overvoltage condition on the DC link.
BMS_d286_dcLinkVoltageHigh.m: Vehicle is unable to start, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_d287_systemIsolationWarning.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected multiple times that the HV isolation is lower than the threshold while the vehicle is in Drive.
BMS_d287_systemIsolationWarning.m: Vehicle is unable to start, charge or support the low voltage system.

BMS_f001_HW_Over_Current.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery pack current exceeds the hardware overcurrent threshold.

BMS_f002_HW_Over_Voltage.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the pack voltage is too high.

BMS_f003_HW_Module_Alarm.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that one or more of the battery modules has reported an alert. This alert may be set falsely at extremely low LV battery voltages.

BMS_f006_HW_Ctr_Sfty_Override.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects unexpected voltage on the contactor service bypass pin.

BMS_f007_SW_Module_Alarm_Broken.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is an issue with the battery monitor board (BMB) alarm.

BMS_f008_HW_HVIL.d: There is a hardware problem with the high voltage interlock loop (HVIL).

BMS_f009_SW_Pos_Contactor_Drive.d: There is an issue with the positive contactor drive circuit. This alert may indicate an open contactor drive circuit, a falsely closed contactor loop, an increase in the contactor coil current during

BMS_f010_SW_Neg_Contactor_Drive.d: There is an issue with the negative contactor drive circuit. This alert may indicate an open pack contactor drive circuit, a falsely closed pack contactor loop, an increase in the pack contactor coil

BMS_f011_HW_Illegal_Ctr_Req.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there are system faults and prevents the pack contactors from closing.

BMS_f015_HW_Sleep_Attempt.d: The complex programmable logic device (CPLD) detects a condition where it cannot go to sleep but is told to do so. The CPLD cannot go to sleep when pack contactors are closed, the high voltage interlo
BMS_f015_HW_Sleep_Attempt.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_f016_SW_Thermal_Gradient.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a temperature imbalance between high voltage (HV) battery modules.
BMS_f016_SW_Thermal_Gradient.m: Inability to charge, drive, or the support low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f017_SW_Brick_OV.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is reporting a voltage above the maximum acceptable cell voltage.

BMS_f018_SW_Brick_UV.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is reporting a voltage below the minimum acceptable cell voltage.

BMS_f019_SW_BMB_Module_OT.d: A battery management board (BMB) has detected an over temperature condition in a battery module.

BMS_f021_SW_Dr_Limits_Regulation.d: The battery management system (BMS) limits power because the pack current, pack voltage, or brick voltage, is outside of the expected bounds.
BMS_f021_SW_Dr_Limits_Regulation.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f022_SW_Over_Current.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a software overcurrent event.

BMS_f023_SW_Contactors_Open_HWOC.d: This alert is used as a counter to record the number of hardware overcurrents (HWOC) detected by the battery management system (BMS).

BMS_f024_SW_Ctrs_Open_Under_Load.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that pack contactors opened while under load.
BMS_f024_SW_Ctrs_Open_Under_Load.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f025_SW_FC_Ctrs_Open_Undr_Ld.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the fast charge contactors opened under load.
BMS_f025_SW_FC_Ctrs_Open_Undr_Ld.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_f026_SW_Ctrs_Disabled.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that pack contactors have been disabled.

BMS_f027_SW_Drive_Iso_Repeated.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there was a repeated loss of isolation during drive.

BMS_f028_SW_Drive_Iso_StdDev.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the standard deviation of isolation resistance while in drive is high.
BMS_f028_SW_Drive_Iso_StdDev.m: This alert is primarily informational and indicates a potential isolation issue.

BMS_f029_SW_Current_Sensor_Reset.d: The battery management system (BMS) senses that the current sensor is undergoing a hard reset.
BMS_f029_SW_Current_Sensor_Reset.m: This alert is primarily informational and used for logging purposes.

BMS_f030_SW_Chg_Port_Door_Open.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the charge port door is open and the fast charge (FC) contactors are welded.

BMS_f031_SW_Precharge_Res_Hot.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the HV battery precharge resistor is above the maximum operating temperature.

BMS_f032_SW_BusVNotReducing.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that bus voltage is not reducing quickly enough.

BMS_f033_SW_Crash.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there was loss of power to pack contactors while they are closed. The BMS assumes that the pyro fuse on the contactor power supply signal blew during a

BMS_f034_SW_Isolation_Sensor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there is an isolation sensor error.

BMS_f035_SW_Isolation.d: There is an external or internal isolation alert while pack contactors are closed.

BMS_f036_SW_HVIL.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects an issue with the high voltage interlock loop (HVIL). The voltage at the HVIL output pin of the BMS is too low (in respect to the number of HVIL nodes the v

BMS_f037_SW_Pos_Contactor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the positive contactor remains open during the first 2 seconds of pack contactors attempting to close.

BMS_f038_SW_Neg_Contactor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the negative contactor remains open during the first 2 seconds of pack contactors attempting to close.

BMS_f039_SW_DC_Link_Over_Voltage.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is an over voltage event external to the high voltage (HV) battery.

BMS_f044_SW_Assertion.d: This is an engineering diagnostic alert. It indicates that the software noticed something unexpected but still ended up in an expected state condition. If this alert persists, it may indicate an issue
BMS_f044_SW_Assertion.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_f047_SW_Memory_Error.d: This alert indicates potential corruption in the battery management system (BMS) board flash memory or RAM.

BMS_f050_SW_BMB_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) is not receiving communication from a battery monitoring board (BMB), indicating that the BMB may be unavailable (MIA).

BMS_f051_SW_Current_Sensor_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) cannot communicate with the high voltage (HV) battery internal current sensor and has reported it as missing (MIA).

BMS_f052_SW_Charger_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) cannot communicate with the master charger and has reported it as missing (MIA).

BMS_f054_SW_Current_Sensor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects an issue with the high voltage (HV) internal current sensor.

BMS_f056_SW_Module_Temp_Outlier.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects one or more thermistors report that a specific module has an outlier temperature when compared to the other modules. This alert is for logging purposes only
BMS_f056_SW_Module_Temp_Outlier.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_f059_SW_Pack_Voltage_Sensing.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the pack voltage does not match the sum of the brick voltages.

BMS_f061_SW_BMS_Power_Supply.d: There is an issue with the power supply to the battery management system (BMS), and the BMS system is operating at an out-of-bounds supply voltage.

BMS_f062_SW_Ctr_Pwr_Supply.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a pack contactor is not getting enough power.

BMS_f063_SW_Precharge_Failure.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue during the precharge process, and the pack contactors were unable to close.

BMS_f064_SW_BrickV_Imbalance.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected there is a brick voltage imbalance.

BMS_f065_SW_Brick_Low_Capacity.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that one brick has lower calculated amp-hour capacity (CAC) than the rest of the bricks.
BMS_f065_SW_Brick_Low_Capacity.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f067_SW_Low_Coolnt_Flow_Rate.d: The battery management system (BMS) has restricted the power outlet to the high voltage (HV) battery to thermally protect the battery cells due to lack of coolant flow.

BMS_f068_SW_Low_SOC.d: The battery management system (BMS) does not have enough power to provide low voltage (LV) support.

BMS_f069_SW_Low_Power.d: The BMS detects that the  state of charge (SOC) of the high voltage (HV) battery is too low to support driving.

BMS_f070_SW_Iso_Fast_Flood.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a sudden loss of isolation while the vehicle is driving.

BMS_f071_SW_SM_TransCon_Not_Met.d: The battery management system (BMS) cannot transition into the requested state because of a blocking condition.

BMS_f073_SW_Unexpctd_HV_Sys_Bhvr.d: The battery management system (BMS) detected abnormal HV bus behavior during precharge.

BMS_f074_SW_Charging.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue with the charger.

BMS_f077_SW_Charger_Regulation.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) stopped AC charging because the maximum brick voltage within the High Voltage (HV) battery or charge current exceeded the target value for too long.

BMS_f079_SW_Ctr_Pwr_Interrupted.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the power supply to the contactors was interrupted.
BMS_f079_SW_Ctr_Pwr_Interrupted.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f080_SW_Int_HV_Disconnect.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery pack voltage differs from the sum of the brick voltages, making the HV battery unavailable for charging, driving, or

BMS_f086_SW_Not_Ok_To_Precharge.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue that prevents precharging and prevents the pack contactors from closing.

BMS_f089_SW_THC_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) reported that the thermal controller (THC) was missing (MIA) on controller area network (CAN).
BMS_f089_SW_THC_MIA.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f093_SW_FastChg_Problem.d: The vehicle has detected a condition preventing fast charging.
BMS_f093_SW_FastChg_Problem.m: The vehicle is unable to fast charge, but AC charging still operates as designed.

BMS_f094_SW_Drive_Inverter_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) does not receive one or more expected controller area network (CAN) messages from the drive inverter (DI) and has reported it as missing (MIA).

BMS_f095_SW_FastChg_Regulation.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) stopped DC charging because the maximum brick voltage within the High Voltage (HV) battery or charge current exceeded the target value for too long.

BMS_f096_SW_Fast_Charger_MIA.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) does not receive messages from the external fast charge equipment.
BMS_f096_SW_Fast_Charger_MIA.m: The vehicle is unable to fast charge, but AC charging still operates as designed.

BMS_f097_HW_BMB_Under_Voltage.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports a brick under voltage event, indicating that the BMB has detected a brick voltage lower than the minimum allowed brick voltage threshold.

BMS_f098_HW_BMB_Over_Voltage.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports a brick over voltage event, indicating that the BMB has detected a brick voltage higher than the maximum allowed brick voltage threshold.

BMS_f100_HW_BMB_Reset.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports a power-on reset event, indicating that the BMB may have previously been unavailable for communication with the battery management system (BMS).

BMS_f101_HW_BMB_Over_Temperature.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports to the battery management system (BMS) that it is overheating.

BMS_f102_HW_BMB_Thermal_Shutdown.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the temperature of a module is too high.

BMS_f103_HW_BMB_Memory_Parity.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects an internal issue with the flash memory on a battery monitoring board (BMB).

BMS_f104_HW_BMB_Enumeration.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that one or several battery monitoring boards (BMB) are unable to enumerate when the vehicle starts.

BMS_f105_SW_One_Module_Tsense.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that a thermistor on a module is shorted or railed.
BMS_f105_SW_One_Module_Tsense.m: The vehicle operates normally with only one thermistor on the module.

BMS_f106_SW_All_Module_Tsense.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) detects that both of the thermistors on a module are reporting out-of-bounds temperatures.

BMS_f107_SW_Cell_Voltage_Sensor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a brick voltage measurement that is inaccurate.

BMS_f108_HW_BMB_Alarm_Self_Test.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a battery monitoring board (BMB) fails the wake up alarm self test.

BMS_f110_SW_Module_Vsense.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the pack voltage does not match the sum of module voltages.

BMS_f114_SW_FC_Contactors.d: The Fast Charge (FC) contactors are not ready for precharge.
BMS_f114_SW_FC_Contactors.m: The vehicle is temporarily unable to charge.

BMS_f117_SW_Delta_SOC_Weak_Short.d: A given brick has an alpha signal below the alert Alpha threshold.
BMS_f117_SW_Delta_SOC_Weak_Short.m: If set and MCU_dSocAlertEnable=1, max charge may be limited; see BMS_u029_dSoc_Limiting.

BMS_f123_SW_Internal_Isolation.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there is low high voltage isolation when pack contactors are opened.

BMS_f124_SW_BMB_Comm_Integrity.d: The vehicle detects a communication issue between the Battery Management System (BMS) and one or more of the Battery Monitor Boards (BMBs).
BMS_f124_SW_BMB_Comm_Integrity.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_f126_HW_BMS_Blind_Mate.d: The Complex Programmable Logic Device (CPLD) of the High Voltage (HV) Battery Management System (BMS) detects a blind mate fault bit.
BMS_f126_HW_BMS_Blind_Mate.m: The HV connector on the battery pack is not connected to the HVIL loop. HVIL behavior may be affected.

BMS_f129_SW_BMB_VSH_Connector.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue with the voltage sensor harness (VSH) connector on the battery monitoring board (BMB).
BMS_f129_SW_BMB_VSH_Connector.m: The vehicle operates normally. This alert indicates that there may be an issue, and if impedance becomes too high the vehicle will not charge or drive

BMS_f132_HW_BMB_OTP_Uncorrctbl.d: An uncorrectable error has been detected in the OTP-EPROM register bank for a battery monitoring board (BMB).

BMS_f133_SW_Service_Tool.d: A software tool (such as Toolbox) connected to the vehicle requests an action from the battery management system (BMS) that is either improperly requested or is not permitted in the current BMS state.
BMS_f133_SW_Service_Tool.m: The requested diagnostic function is not performed.

BMS_f136_SW_Module_OT_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a module is overheating.

BMS_f137_SW_Brick_UV_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is an over-discharged brick.
BMS_f137_SW_Brick_UV_Warning.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f138_SW_Brick_OV_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the voltage of one or more bricks is above the warning threshold.
BMS_f138_SW_Brick_OV_Warning.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_f139_SW_DC_Link_V_Irrational.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a that there is an issue with the DC link voltage sensor.
BMS_f139_SW_DC_Link_V_Irrational.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f140_SW_OverCurrent_Sense.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is a high voltage (HV) battery current sensor (shunt) error.

BMS_f141_SW_12V_Pwr_Supply_Low.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue with the low voltage (LV) power supply to the contactors.

BMS_f142_SW_Isolation_Degradatio.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the high voltage (HV) isolation contactor closed below the warning threshold.
BMS_f142_SW_Isolation_Degradatio.m: This alert indicates that HV isolation is low, but above the sufficient level for vehicle operation.

BMS_f144_SW_CPLD_Version_Wrong.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the Complex Programmable Logic Device (CPLD) version is not supported by the current firmware (FW).

BMS_f145_SW_socChange.d: The vehicle's State of Charge (SOC) changed when the pack is resting from open-circuit voltage (OCV) calibration.
BMS_f145_SW_socChange.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_f146_SW_Brick_Overdischarged.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is over-discharged.

BMS_f149_SW_precharge_too_short.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the length of time it took the vehicle to precharge was too short.

BMS_f150_SW_precharge_too_long.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that it is taking too long to reach the target precharge voltage and prevents packs contactors from closing. This indicates that the voltage on the DC link

BMS_f151_SW_external_isolation.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that high voltage (HV) isolation is too low while pack contactors are closed.

BMS_f152_SW_pos_contactor_welded.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the positive contactor is stuck or welded.
BMS_f152_SW_pos_contactor_welded.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f153_SW_neg_contactor_welded.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the negative contactor is stuck or welded.
BMS_f153_SW_neg_contactor_welded.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_f155_SW_BMB_Vref_leaky.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a potential battery monitoring board (BMB) hardware issue related to the analog-to-digital converter (ADC) voltage reference (VREF).
BMS_f155_SW_BMB_Vref_leaky.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_f156_SW_BMB_Vref_bad.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a battery monitoring board (BMB) voltage reference is unstable.

BMS_f158_SW_Low_Isolation_Wrn.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects low high voltage (HV) isolation when pack contactors were closed.
BMS_f158_SW_Low_Isolation_Wrn.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It is intended to flag low isolation issues before they are serious enough to

BMS_f160_SW_Brick_Overcharged.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is over-charged.
BMS_f160_SW_Brick_Overcharged.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It is intended to flag early overvoltage issues.

BMS_f161_SW_Contactor_Stress.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that pack contactor degradation has exceeded the maximum threshold.
BMS_f161_SW_Contactor_Stress.m: This alert is primarily informational and serves as an early warning of pack contactor degradation.

BMS_f162_SW_FC_Prechg_Too_Slow.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that precharge was too slow to allow fast charge (FC).
BMS_f162_SW_FC_Prechg_Too_Slow.m: Unable to DC Fast Charge / Supercharge

BMS_f163_SW_Contactor_WOT_Count.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that contactors have undergone stress from a wide-open throttle (WOT) event.

BMS_f164_SW_Brick_SOC_Imbalance.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a state of charge (SOC) imbalance between bricks associated with the same module.
BMS_f164_SW_Brick_SOC_Imbalance.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_f165_SW_Module_SOC_Imbalance.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) detects a state of charge (SOC) imbalance between modules.
BMS_f165_SW_Module_SOC_Imbalance.m: No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_f166_SW_AhToBeCharged_Imbal.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a high delta between the brick that needs the least amp hours (Ah) compared to the one that needs the most Ah.
BMS_f166_SW_AhToBeCharged_Imbal.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It may indicate a poorly balanced pack, which should go away after the pack is

BMS_f168_SW_Uncontrolled_Regen.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an uncontrolled regen event.

BMS_f169_SW_ModuleBrick_Mismatch.d: he battery management system (BMS) has detected there is a mismatch between the sum of bricks of one module and the module voltage.
BMS_f169_SW_ModuleBrick_Mismatch.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It may indicate an issue with voltage sensing.

BMS_f170_SW_Module_Overvoltage.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a module voltage sensor indicates voltage is too high.

BMS_f171_SW_Pack_Motor_Mismatch.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects the GTW_frontDriveUnitType does not match the high voltage (HV) battery's expectations.
BMS_f171_SW_Pack_Motor_Mismatch.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It is usually triggered after an HV battery replacement.

BMS_f172_SW_Drive_Iso_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected low isolation conditions during multiple drive cycles.

BMS_f173_SW_Brick6_Sense.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected battery monitor board (BMB) brick 6 voltage sense inconsistencies.
BMS_f173_SW_Brick6_Sense.m: Slight reduction of range at full charge

BMS_f174_StandbySupplyOutputLow.d: The standby supply output voltage is less than expected. The standby supply is unavailable.

BMS_f176_ReplaceSmartFuseNow.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the HV battery pyro fuse is less than 1 months from end of life. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_f177_OpenVshDetected.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) detects an open circuit on the Voltage Sense Harness (VSH).

BMS_f178_OvUvRegWrong.d: Detect if the contents of the COV or CUV registers are wrong.

BMS_f179_ReplaceSmartFuseLimp.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the High Voltage (HV) battery pyro fuse is close to expiration. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_f180_ReplaceSmartFuseBlockHv.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the High Voltage (HV) battery pyro fuse is close to expiration or expired. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_u001_DisChg_While_Charging.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery is not charging.

BMS_u002_Ramp_Down_Active.d: The battery management system (BMS) has put the high voltage (HV) battery into ramp down.

BMS_u003_Insufficient_drive_pwr.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is not enough power from the high voltage (HV) battery to drive.

BMS_u004_Charge_Cable_Connected.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a charge cable is inserted when the vehicle attempts to shift into Drive.

BMS_u005_Low_Power_Until_Charge.d: The battery management system (BMS) has reduced output power until the vehicle charges.

BMS_u006_End_of_Drive_Ramp_Down.d: The battery management system (BMS) has put the high voltage (HV) battery into an end-of-drive ramp down due to a low state of charge (SOC).
BMS_u006_End_of_Drive_Ramp_Down.m: Vehicle shutting down - PULL OVER SAFELY

BMS_u007_Slowed_Chg_Batt_Cold.d: The battery management system (BMS) has limited the rate of charging until cell temperatures increase.
BMS_u007_Slowed_Chg_Batt_Cold.m: Battery is heating - Keep charge cable inserted

BMS_u008_limpMode.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a condition that would damage the high voltage (HV) system, so it puts the vehicle in limp mode.

BMS_u011_Fast_Charger_Problem.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue that prevents DC fast charging.
BMS_u011_Fast_Charger_Problem.m: Unable to DC Fast Charge / Supercharge

BMS_u012_Fast_Charger_Incompat.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the fast charger is not compatible with the firmware (FW) version installed on the vehicle.

BMS_u013_Not_Supercharge_Capable.d: The vehicle attempts to Supercharge when it is not allowed / configured to do so.

BMS_u014_Not_Enough_Pwr_To_Heat.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery is not receiving enough charge power to heat itself.
BMS_u014_Not_Enough_Pwr_To_Heat.m: Power source insufficient to heat battery

BMS_u015_Not_Fast_Charge_Capable.d: The vehicle is not configured for DC fast charging.

BMS_u016_FEIM_Delayed_Ctr_Close.d: The battery management system (BMS) has requested another isolation check before closing pack contactors.
BMS_u016_FEIM_Delayed_Ctr_Close.m: Please wait while system performs check

BMS_u017_Charge_Already_Complete.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the target start of charge (SOC) when attempting to charge has already been reached.
BMS_u017_Charge_Already_Complete.m: Battery charge level exceeds charge limit

BMS_u018_SOC_Imbalance_Limiting.d: The battery managed system (BMS) detects a condition internal to the high voltage (HV) battery that requires it to limit the maximum allowed brick voltage.

BMS_u019_Acceleration_Reduced.d: The battery management system (BMS) has limited the maximum discharge current.

BMS_u020_Cannot_Precharge_FC.d: The battery management system (BMS) is unable to precharge for DC fast charging.

BMS_u021_SC_Post_Out_Of_Service.d: A Supercharger post is out of service.

BMS_u022_EVSE_UpdateInProgress.d: A Supercharger post update in progress.

BMS_u023_AdapterUpdateInProgress.d: The fast charge adapter software is being updated.

BMS_u024_Not_Uncorked_Capable.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery current sensor does not support uncorked performance configuration.

BMS_u025_Brick_Voltage_Limit.d: The battery management system (BMS) has decreased the maximum allowed brick voltage from its original value.

BMS_u026_Capacity_Imbalance.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a capacity imbalance within a module has exceeded the maximum threshold.

BMS_u027_ChademoAdapterFoldback.d: The CHAdeMO charge handle adapter has reported that the adapter temperature has exceeded the threshold at which the vehicle should begin folding back charge current.

BMS_u028_ChademoAdapterOverTemp.d: CHAdeMO adapter reported vehicle connector temperature that is too hot; charging was terminated.

BMS_u029_dSoc_Limiting.d: There is condition internal to the high voltage (HV) battery requiring the battery management system (BMS) to limit the maximum allowed brick voltage.

BMS_u030_UnsupportedAdapter.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an unsupported charging adapter.
BMS_u030_UnsupportedAdapter.m: Charging adapter has electric arc flash hazard

BMS_u031_ReplaceSmartFuseSoon.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the HV battery pyro fuse is less than 6 months from end of life. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_u032_ReplaceSmartFuseNeeded.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the HV battery pyro fuse is less than 3 months from end of life. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_w001_HW_Over_Current.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery pack current exceeds the hardware overcurrent threshold.

BMS_w002_HW_Over_Voltage.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the pack voltage is too high.

BMS_w003_HW_Module_Alarm.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that one or more of the battery modules has reported an alert. This alert may be set falsely at extremely low LV battery voltages.

BMS_w006_HW_Ctr_Sfty_Override.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects unexpected voltage on the contactor service bypass pin.

BMS_w007_SW_Module_Alarm_Broken.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is an issue with the battery monitor board (BMB) alarm.

BMS_w008_HW_HVIL.d: There is a hardware problem with the high voltage interlock loop (HVIL).

BMS_w009_SW_Pos_Contactor_Drive.d: There is an issue with the positive contactor drive circuit. This alert may indicate an open contactor drive circuit, a falsely closed contactor loop, an increase in the contactor coil current during

BMS_w010_SW_Neg_Contactor_Drive.d: There is an issue with the negative contactor drive circuit. This alert may indicate an open pack contactor drive circuit, a falsely closed pack contactor loop, an increase in the pack contactor coil

BMS_w011_HW_Illegal_Ctr_Req.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there are system faults and prevents the pack contactors from closing.
BMS_w011_HW_Illegal_Ctr_Req.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w015_HW_Sleep_Attempt.d: The complex programmable logic device (CPLD) detects a condition where it cannot go to sleep but is told to do so. The CPLD cannot go to sleep when pack contactors are closed, the high voltage interlo
BMS_w015_HW_Sleep_Attempt.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_w016_SW_Thermal_Gradient.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a temperature imbalance between high voltage (HV) battery modules.
BMS_w016_SW_Thermal_Gradient.m: Inability to charge, drive, or the support low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w017_SW_Brick_OV.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is reporting a voltage above the maximum acceptable cell voltage.

BMS_w018_SW_Brick_UV.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is reporting a voltage below the minimum acceptable cell voltage.
BMS_w018_SW_Brick_UV.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w019_SW_BMB_Module_OT.d: A battery management board (BMB) has detected an over temperature condition in a battery module.

BMS_w021_SW_Dr_Limits_Regulation.d: The battery management system (BMS) limits power because the pack current, pack voltage, or brick voltage, is outside of the expected bounds.
BMS_w021_SW_Dr_Limits_Regulation.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w022_SW_Over_Current.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a software overcurrent event.

BMS_w023_SW_Contactors_Open_HWOC.d: This alert is used as a counter to record the number of hardware overcurrents (HWOC) detected by the battery management system (BMS).

BMS_w024_SW_Ctrs_Open_Under_Load.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that pack contactors opened while under load.
BMS_w024_SW_Ctrs_Open_Under_Load.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w025_SW_FC_Ctrs_Open_Undr_Ld.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the fast charge contactors opened under load.
BMS_w025_SW_FC_Ctrs_Open_Undr_Ld.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_w026_SW_Ctrs_Disabled.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that pack contactors have been disabled.

BMS_w027_SW_Drive_Iso_Repeated.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there was a repeated loss of isolation during drive.

BMS_w028_SW_Drive_Iso_StdDev.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the standard deviation of isolation resistance while in drive is high.
BMS_w028_SW_Drive_Iso_StdDev.m: This alert is primarily informational and indicates a potential isolation issue.

BMS_w029_SW_Current_Sensor_Reset.d: The battery management system (BMS) senses that the current sensor is undergoing a hard reset.
BMS_w029_SW_Current_Sensor_Reset.m: This alert is primarily informational and used for logging purposes.

BMS_w030_SW_Chg_Port_Door_Open.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the charge port door is open and the fast charge (FC) contactors are welded.
BMS_w030_SW_Chg_Port_Door_Open.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w031_SW_Precharge_Res_Hot.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the HV battery precharge resistor is above the maximum operating temperature.

BMS_w032_SW_BusVNotReducing.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that bus voltage is not reducing quickly enough.

BMS_w033_SW_Crash.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there was loss of power to pack contactors while they are closed. The BMS assumes that the pyro fuse on the contactor power supply signal blew during a

BMS_w034_SW_Isolation_Sensor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there is an isolation sensor error.

BMS_w035_SW_Isolation.d: There is an external or internal isolation alert while pack contactors are closed.

BMS_w036_SW_HVIL.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects an issue with the high voltage interlock loop (HVIL). The voltage at the HVIL output pin of the BMS is too low (in respect to the number of HVIL nodes the v
BMS_w036_SW_HVIL.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w037_SW_Pos_Contactor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the positive contactor remains open during the first 2 seconds of pack contactors attempting to close.

BMS_w038_SW_Neg_Contactor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the negative contactor remains open during the first 2 seconds of pack contactors attempting to close.

BMS_w039_SW_DC_Link_Over_Voltage.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is an over voltage event external to the high voltage (HV) battery.

BMS_w044_SW_Assertion.d: This is an engineering diagnostic alert. It indicates that the software noticed something unexpected but still ended up in an expected state condition. If this alert persists, it may indicate an issue
BMS_w044_SW_Assertion.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_w047_SW_Memory_Error.d: This alert indicates potential corruption in the battery management system (BMS) board flash memory or RAM.

BMS_w050_SW_BMB_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) is not receiving communication from a battery monitoring board (BMB), indicating that the BMB may be unavailable (MIA).

BMS_w051_SW_Current_Sensor_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) cannot communicate with the high voltage (HV) battery internal current sensor and has reported it as missing (MIA).

BMS_w052_SW_Charger_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) cannot communicate with the master charger and has reported it as missing (MIA).

BMS_w054_SW_Current_Sensor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects an issue with the high voltage (HV) internal current sensor.

BMS_w056_SW_Module_Temp_Outlier.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects one or more thermistors report that a specific module has an outlier temperature when compared to the other modules. This alert is for logging purposes only
BMS_w056_SW_Module_Temp_Outlier.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_w059_SW_Pack_Voltage_Sensing.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the pack voltage does not match the sum of the brick voltages.

BMS_w061_SW_BMS_Power_Supply.d: There is an issue with the power supply to the battery management system (BMS), and the BMS system is operating at an out-of-bounds supply voltage.

BMS_w062_SW_Ctr_Pwr_Supply.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a pack contactor is not getting enough power.

BMS_w063_SW_Precharge_Failure.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue during the precharge process, and the pack contactors were unable to close.

BMS_w064_SW_BrickV_Imbalance.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected there is a brick voltage imbalance.

BMS_w065_SW_Brick_Low_Capacity.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that one brick has lower calculated amp-hour capacity (CAC) than the rest of the bricks.
BMS_w065_SW_Brick_Low_Capacity.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w067_SW_Low_Coolnt_Flow_Rate.d: The battery management system (BMS) has restricted the power outlet to the high voltage (HV) battery to thermally protect the battery cells due to lack of coolant flow.

BMS_w068_SW_Low_SOC.d: The battery management system (BMS) does not have enough power to provide low voltage (LV) support.

BMS_w069_SW_Low_Power.d: The BMS detects that the  state of charge (SOC) of the high voltage (HV) battery is too low to support driving.
BMS_w069_SW_Low_Power.m: The vehicle begins end-of-drive ramp down.

BMS_w070_SW_Iso_Fast_Flood.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a sudden loss of isolation while the vehicle is driving.

BMS_w071_SW_SM_TransCon_Not_Met.d: The battery management system (BMS) cannot transition into the requested state because of a blocking condition.

BMS_w073_SW_Unexpctd_HV_Sys_Bhvr.d: The battery management system (BMS) detected abnormal HV bus behavior during precharge.

BMS_w074_SW_Charging.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue with the charger.

BMS_w077_SW_Charger_Regulation.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) stopped AC charging because the maximum brick voltage within the High Voltage (HV) battery or charge current exceeded the target value for too long.

BMS_w079_SW_Ctr_Pwr_Interrupted.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the power supply to the contactors was interrupted.
BMS_w079_SW_Ctr_Pwr_Interrupted.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w080_SW_Int_HV_Disconnect.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the high voltage (HV) battery pack voltage differs from the sum of the brick voltages, making the HV battery unavailable for charging, driving, or

BMS_w086_SW_Not_Ok_To_Precharge.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue that prevents precharging and prevents the pack contactors from closing.

BMS_w089_SW_THC_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) reported that the thermal controller (THC) was missing (MIA) on controller area network (CAN).
BMS_w089_SW_THC_MIA.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w093_SW_FastChg_Problem.d: The vehicle has detected a condition preventing fast charging.
BMS_w093_SW_FastChg_Problem.m: The vehicle is unable to fast charge, but AC charging still operates as designed.

BMS_w094_SW_Drive_Inverter_MIA.d: The battery management system (BMS) does not receive one or more expected controller area network (CAN) messages from the drive inverter (DI) and has reported it as missing (MIA).

BMS_w095_SW_FastChg_Regulation.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) stopped DC charging because the maximum brick voltage within the High Voltage (HV) battery or charge current exceeded the target value for too long.

BMS_w096_SW_Fast_Charger_MIA.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) does not receive messages from the external fast charge equipment.
BMS_w096_SW_Fast_Charger_MIA.m: The vehicle is unable to fast charge, but AC charging still operates as designed.

BMS_w097_HW_BMB_Under_Voltage.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports a brick under voltage event, indicating that the BMB has detected a brick voltage lower than the minimum allowed brick voltage threshold.

BMS_w098_HW_BMB_Over_Voltage.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports a brick over voltage event, indicating that the BMB has detected a brick voltage higher than the maximum allowed brick voltage threshold.

BMS_w100_HW_BMB_Reset.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports a power-on reset event, indicating that the BMB may have previously been unavailable for communication with the battery management system (BMS).

BMS_w101_HW_BMB_Over_Temperature.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) reports to the battery management system (BMS) that it is overheating.

BMS_w102_HW_BMB_Thermal_Shutdown.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the temperature of a module is too high.

BMS_w103_HW_BMB_Memory_Parity.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects an internal issue with the flash memory on a battery monitoring board (BMB).

BMS_w104_HW_BMB_Enumeration.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that one or several battery monitoring boards (BMB) are unable to enumerate when the vehicle starts.

BMS_w105_SW_One_Module_Tsense.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that a thermistor on a module is shorted or railed.
BMS_w105_SW_One_Module_Tsense.m: The vehicle operates normally with only one thermistor on the module.

BMS_w106_SW_All_Module_Tsense.d: A battery monitoring board (BMB) detects that both of the thermistors on a module are reporting out-of-bounds temperatures.

BMS_w107_SW_Cell_Voltage_Sensor.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a brick voltage measurement that is inaccurate.

BMS_w108_HW_BMB_Alarm_Self_Test.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a battery monitoring board (BMB) fails the wake up alarm self test.

BMS_w110_SW_Module_Vsense.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the pack voltage does not match the sum of module voltages.

BMS_w114_SW_FC_Contactors.d: The Fast Charge (FC) contactors are not ready for precharge.
BMS_w114_SW_FC_Contactors.m: The vehicle is temporarily unable to charge.

BMS_w117_SW_Delta_SOC_Weak_Short.d: A given brick has an alpha signal below the alert Alpha threshold.
BMS_w117_SW_Delta_SOC_Weak_Short.m: If set and MCU_dSocAlertEnable=1, max charge may be limited; see BMS_u029_dSoc_Limiting.

BMS_w123_SW_Internal_Isolation.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that there is low high voltage isolation when pack contactors are opened.

BMS_w124_SW_BMB_Comm_Integrity.d: The vehicle detects a communication issue between the Battery Management System (BMS) and one or more of the Battery Monitor Boards (BMBs).
BMS_w124_SW_BMB_Comm_Integrity.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_w126_HW_BMS_Blind_Mate.d: The Complex Programmable Logic Device (CPLD) of the High Voltage (HV) Battery Management System (BMS) detects a blind mate fault bit.
BMS_w126_HW_BMS_Blind_Mate.m: The HV connector on the battery pack is not connected to the HVIL loop. HVIL behavior may be affected.

BMS_w129_SW_BMB_VSH_Connector.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue with the voltage sensor harness (VSH) connector on the battery monitoring board (BMB).
BMS_w129_SW_BMB_VSH_Connector.m: The vehicle operates normally. This alert indicates that there may be an issue, and if impedance becomes too high the vehicle will not charge or drive

BMS_w132_HW_BMB_OTP_Uncorrctbl.d: An uncorrectable error has been detected in the OTP-EPROM register bank for a battery monitoring board (BMB).

BMS_w133_SW_Service_Tool.d: A software tool (such as Toolbox) connected to the vehicle requests an action from the battery management system (BMS) that is either improperly requested or is not permitted in the current BMS state.
BMS_w133_SW_Service_Tool.m: The requested diagnostic function is not performed.

BMS_w136_SW_Module_OT_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a module is overheating.

BMS_w137_SW_Brick_UV_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is an over-discharged brick.
BMS_w137_SW_Brick_UV_Warning.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w138_SW_Brick_OV_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the voltage of one or more bricks is above the warning threshold.
BMS_w138_SW_Brick_OV_Warning.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_w139_SW_DC_Link_V_Irrational.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a that there is an issue with the DC link voltage sensor.
BMS_w139_SW_DC_Link_V_Irrational.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w140_SW_OverCurrent_Sense.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that there is a high voltage (HV) battery current sensor (shunt) error.

BMS_w141_SW_12V_Pwr_Supply_Low.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an issue with the low voltage (LV) power supply to the contactors.

BMS_w142_SW_Isolation_Degradatio.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that the high voltage (HV) isolation contactor closed below the warning threshold.
BMS_w142_SW_Isolation_Degradatio.m: This alert indicates that HV isolation is low, but above the sufficient level for vehicle operation.

BMS_w144_SW_CPLD_Version_Wrong.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the Complex Programmable Logic Device (CPLD) version is not supported by the current firmware (FW).
BMS_w144_SW_CPLD_Version_Wrong.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w145_SW_socChange.d: The vehicle's State of Charge (SOC) changed when the pack is resting from open-circuit voltage (OCV) calibration.
BMS_w145_SW_socChange.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_w146_SW_Brick_Overdischarged.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is over-discharged.

BMS_w149_SW_precharge_too_short.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the length of time it took the vehicle to precharge was too short.

BMS_w150_SW_precharge_too_long.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects that it is taking too long to reach the target precharge voltage and prevents packs contactors from closing. This indicates that the voltage on the DC link

BMS_w151_SW_external_isolation.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that high voltage (HV) isolation is too low while pack contactors are closed.

BMS_w152_SW_pos_contactor_welded.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the positive contactor is stuck or welded.
BMS_w152_SW_pos_contactor_welded.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w153_SW_neg_contactor_welded.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that the negative contactor is stuck or welded.
BMS_w153_SW_neg_contactor_welded.m: Inability to charge, drive, or support the low voltage (LV) system

BMS_w155_SW_BMB_Vref_leaky.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a potential battery monitoring board (BMB) hardware issue related to the analog-to-digital converter (ADC) voltage reference (VREF).
BMS_w155_SW_BMB_Vref_leaky.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_w156_SW_BMB_Vref_bad.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected a battery monitoring board (BMB) voltage reference is unstable.

BMS_w158_SW_Low_Isolation_Wrn.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects low high voltage (HV) isolation when pack contactors were closed.
BMS_w158_SW_Low_Isolation_Wrn.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It is intended to flag low isolation issues before they are serious enough to

BMS_w160_SW_Brick_Overcharged.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a brick is over-charged.
BMS_w160_SW_Brick_Overcharged.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It is intended to flag early overvoltage issues.

BMS_w161_SW_Contactor_Stress.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that pack contactor degradation has exceeded the maximum threshold.
BMS_w161_SW_Contactor_Stress.m: This alert is primarily informational and serves as an early warning of pack contactor degradation.

BMS_w162_SW_FC_Prechg_Too_Slow.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that precharge was too slow to allow fast charge (FC).
BMS_w162_SW_FC_Prechg_Too_Slow.m: Unable to DC Fast Charge / Supercharge

BMS_w163_SW_Contactor_WOT_Count.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that contactors have undergone stress from a wide-open throttle (WOT) event.

BMS_w164_SW_Brick_SOC_Imbalance.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a state of charge (SOC) imbalance between bricks associated with the same module.
BMS_w164_SW_Brick_SOC_Imbalance.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes.

BMS_w165_SW_Module_SOC_Imbalance.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) detects a state of charge (SOC) imbalance between modules.
BMS_w165_SW_Module_SOC_Imbalance.m: No expected impact on vehicle functionality.

BMS_w166_SW_AhToBeCharged_Imbal.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects a high delta between the brick that needs the least amp hours (Ah) compared to the one that needs the most Ah.
BMS_w166_SW_AhToBeCharged_Imbal.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It may indicate a poorly balanced pack, which should go away after the pack is

BMS_w168_SW_Uncontrolled_Regen.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected an uncontrolled regen event.

BMS_w169_SW_ModuleBrick_Mismatch.d: he battery management system (BMS) has detected there is a mismatch between the sum of bricks of one module and the module voltage.
BMS_w169_SW_ModuleBrick_Mismatch.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It may indicate an issue with voltage sensing.

BMS_w170_SW_Module_Overvoltage.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected that a module voltage sensor indicates voltage is too high.

BMS_w171_SW_Pack_Motor_Mismatch.d: The battery management system (BMS) detects the GTW_frontDriveUnitType does not match the high voltage (HV) battery's expectations.
BMS_w171_SW_Pack_Motor_Mismatch.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. It is usually triggered after an HV battery replacement.

BMS_w172_SW_Drive_Iso_Warning.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected low isolation conditions during multiple drive cycles.

BMS_w173_SW_Brick6_Sense.d: The battery management system (BMS) has detected battery monitor board (BMB) brick 6 voltage sense inconsistencies.
BMS_w173_SW_Brick6_Sense.m: Slight reduction of range at full charge

BMS_w174_StandbySupplyOutputLow.d: The standby supply output voltage is less than expected. The standby supply is unavailable.

BMS_w176_ReplaceSmartFuseNow.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the HV battery pyro fuse is less than 1 months from end of life. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_w177_OpenVshDetected.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) detects an open circuit on the Voltage Sense Harness (VSH).

BMS_w178_OvUvRegWrong.d: Detect if the contents of the COV or CUV registers are wrong.

BMS_w179_ReplaceSmartFuseLimp.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the High Voltage (HV) battery pyro fuse is close to expiration. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

BMS_w180_ReplaceSmartFuseBlockHv.d: The Battery Management System (BMS) has detected the High Voltage (HV) battery pyro fuse is close to expiration or expired. The fuse must be replaced with a new self-powered hybrid pyro fuse.

CCCM_a001_notCalibrated.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) capacitive film is disconnected or damaged.
CCCM_a001_notCalibrated.m: Capacitive touch functionality on CCCM may not operate as expected.

CCCM_a002_capFilmOutofRange.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) force sensor film is shorted to ground or Voltage Common Collector (VCC).
CCCM_a002_capFilmOutofRange.m: Capacitive touch functionality on CCCM may not operate as expected.

CCCM_a003_forceSensorFault.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) has detected a condition in the force sensor.
CCCM_a003_forceSensorFault.m: Capacitive touch functionality on CCCM may not operate as expected.

CCCM_a004_memoryError.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) Electrically Erasable Programmable Read-only Memory (EEPROM) checksum does not match calculated checksum.
CCCM_a004_memoryError.m: Corrupted software may impact CCCM functionality.

CCCM_a005_unexpectedCapPressShort.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) detects a capacitive press greater than 1 second with no force detected.
CCCM_a005_unexpectedCapPressShort.m: Capacitive touch functionality on CCCM may not operate as expected.

CCCM_a006_unexpectedCapPressLong.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) detects a capacitive press greater than 5 seconds with no force detected.
CCCM_a006_unexpectedCapPressLong.m: Capacitive touch functionality on CCCM may not operate as expected.

CCCM_a007_unexpectedForcePress.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) force sensor detects a press without any capacitive press.
CCCM_a007_unexpectedForcePress.m: Capacitive touch functionality on CCCM may not operate as expected.

CCCM_a008_underVoltage.d: An undervoltage condition has been detected by the Center Console Control Module (CCCM). Low voltage battery detected under 8V for 10 seconds.
CCCM_a008_underVoltage.m: Persistent undervoltage condition may lead to CCCM hardware damage.

CCCM_a009_overVoltage.d: An overvoltage condition has been detected by the Center Console Control Module (CCCM). Low voltage battery detected over 17V for 10 seconds.
CCCM_a009_overVoltage.m: Persistent overvoltage condition may lead to CCCM hardware damage.

CCCM_a010_VCFRONT_MIA.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) communication to front vehicle controller (VCFRONT) node is Missing In Action (MIA).
CCCM_a010_VCFRONT_MIA.m: CCCM will be unable to communicate with VCFRONT.

CCCM_a011_DI_MIA.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) communication to Drive Inverter (DI) node is Missing In Action (MIA).
CCCM_a011_DI_MIA.m: CCCM will be unable to communicate with DI.

CCCM_a012_RAM_Failure.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) Random Access Memory (RAM) data read/write integrity failure.
CCCM_a012_RAM_Failure.m: No vehicle impact. This alert is intended for logging purposes.

CCCM_a013_ROM_Failure.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) Read Only Memory (ROM) data read/write integrity failure.
CCCM_a013_ROM_Failure.m: No vehicle impact. This alert is intended for logging purposes.

CCCM_a014_CPU_Failure.d: Center Console Control Module (CCCM) CPU critical register integrity check.
CCCM_a014_CPU_Failure.m: No vehicle impact. This alert is intended for logging purposes.
