UI_a086_TouchEnumerationError.d: Display status check failed due to touch device missing.
UI_a086_TouchEnumerationError.m: Touchscreen is unresponsive or has limited functionality.

UI_a088_CellRemovableSimMissing.d: The SIM card type is set to Removable, is missing, or is not fully seated, which may lead to a loss of cellular connectivity.
UI_a088_CellRemovableSimMissing.m: There may be a loss of cellular connectivity.

UI_a089_RadioReset.d: The radio server has been restarted.
UI_a089_RadioReset.m: The radio may not operate as expected. Radio functionality may be briefly unavailable.

UI_a090_RadioPingFailError.d: The vehicle gateway (GTW) cannot ping the radio tuner after at least 3 attempts to connect.
UI_a090_RadioPingFailError.m: The radio tuner may not function as expected.

UI_a091_VehicleLinkStall.d: The QtCarVehicle link is stalled, preventing communication between the Center Instrument Display (CID) or User Interface (UI) and the vehicle Gateway (GTW).
UI_a091_VehicleLinkStall.m: The touchscreen UI may not reflect the current state of the vehicle. Vehicle information, such as turn indicators, drive modes, and vehicle speed, may

UI_a092_updateStarted.m: The vehicle software is being updated. The vehicle will be unable to start a drive cycle.

UI_a093_updateEnded.m: The vehicle software may have been updated. If the update did not complete, the vehicle may not function as expected.

UI_a095_CidStorageRunningLow.m: Low Disk Space (CID Storage is running low)

UI_a096_VideodPipelineIssueDetected.d: A condition is detected with the video stream(s) coming from the camera(s).
UI_a096_VideodPipelineIssueDetected.m: The video stream(s) from the affected camera(s) may not be available for Camera Viewer, Dashcam, and/or Sentry Mode.

UI_a097_AudiodRestarted.d: The main audio process (Audiod) Input / Output (IO) thread is being prevented from executing, or blocked. Audiod has restarted due to Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) IO function taking longer
UI_a097_AudiodRestarted.m: Audiod and vehicle audio may not function as expected.

UI_a099_eMMCStatusError.d: eMMC Status Register has error bits set.

UI_a100_eMMCFTLError.d: eMMC FTL Register has been set.

UI_a101_wifiStackProblem.d: A Wi-Fi stack condition is detected, which may lead to a loss of Wi-Fi connectivity.
UI_a101_wifiStackProblem.m: There may be a loss of Wi-Fi connectivity.

UI_a102_A2bDiscoveryFailed.d: The A2B primary node (in the car computer) was unable to discover any other nodes on the A2B bus, which may lead to a complete loss of audio.
UI_a102_A2bDiscoveryFailed.m: There may be a complete loss of audio.

UI_a103_UsbHubNotEnumerating.d: The USB hub is not enumerating.
UI_a103_UsbHubNotEnumerating.m: USB hub may be broken or disconnected

UI_a104_DashcamUsbDriveMissing.d: The Tesla Dashcam / Sentry Mode USB drive was installed but is missing or not available.
UI_a104_DashcamUsbDriveMissing.m: Tesla Dashcam USB drive not detected

UI_a107_DashcamUsbDriveTooBigForVfatFsck.d: The drive is too large for FAT32 to support repairing.

UI_a108_DashcamUsbDriveGettingFull.d: The Dashcam USB drive is running out of available space to store 60 minutes worth of Recent Clips, which may prevent the Dashcam from recording new video clips.
UI_a108_DashcamUsbDriveGettingFull.m: Dashcam USB drive is getting full

UI_a109_DashcamUsbDriveTooSmall.d: The USB drive for Dashcam and Sentry Mode does not have enough space to store video clips.
UI_a109_DashcamUsbDriveTooSmall.m: Dashcam USB drive is too small

UI_a110_DashcamUsbDriveCorrupt.d: The drive is likely corrupt and should be reformatted.
UI_a110_DashcamUsbDriveCorrupt.m: Dashcam USB drive may be corrupted

UI_a111_DashcamUsbDriveNotSuperSpeed.d: The USB drive is not currently plugged into a port that supports USB 3.0 Super Speed.
UI_a111_DashcamUsbDriveNotSuperSpeed.m: Re-insert USB into glovebox for higher speed

UI_a112_badUSBDevice.d: A USB device with an internal or external condition has been plugged in, which may cause the car computer to reboot. The center display and heating, ventilation, air-conditioning (HVAC) system may tur

UI_a113_DashcamHasOnboardSentryClips.d: During the last Sentry alarm event, the Dashcam copied video clips to the onboard storage, which can be transferred to a USB drive via the Dashcam viewer.
UI_a113_DashcamHasOnboardSentryClips.m: Dashcam has Sentry Clips stored onboard

UI_a114_drivingVisualizationDegraded.d: The data stream between the Autopilot board and Infotainment computer has a hardware or software condition, which may prevent lane lines and other vehicles from appearing on the center display.

UI_a116_UncorrectableMemoryError.d: Uncorrectable memory errors were reported by the memory controller.
UI_a116_UncorrectableMemoryError.m: Corrupted data was provided to the operating system when reading memory

UI_a117_VehicleSelfTestRunning.d: Customer initiated Vehicle Self Test running.
UI_a117_VehicleSelfTestRunning.m: Other alerts may be falsely triggered during the Vehicle Self Test

UI_a118_NVMeReset.m: System hang, potential data loss, and UI freeze

UI_a119_nvmeBlockDeviceMissing.d: NVMe block devices cannot be accessed.
UI_a119_nvmeBlockDeviceMissing.m: Cannot read or write data from the NVMe

UI_a120_nvmePCIeLinkErrorDetected.d: PCIe link errors due to misconfiguration or non zero error counters.
UI_a120_nvmePCIeLinkErrorDetected.m: Data corruption on the NVMe PCIe link

UI_a121_nvmeSmartLogCritical.d: Critical warning bits are set in the NVMe smart log.
UI_a121_nvmeSmartLogCritical.m: NVMe subsystem reliability might be affected

UI_a126_UsbErrorDriveCorrupt.d: The drive is likely corrupt and should be reformatted.

UI_a127_lowBrakeAirPressure.d: The Tesla Air Suspension Electronic Control Unit (ECU) has detected low pressure while the vehicle is in an active drive cycle.

UI_a128_dgpuNotDetected.d: Unable to detect a functional dGPU.

UI_a129_dgpuOperationFailure.d: There are errors associated with the dGPU.

UI_a130_QtCarClusterExitError.d: User Interface cluster display (QtCarCluster) has crashed and will reboot. A crashlog has been generated and will be uploaded to Sentry (if enabled for this vehicle). Check for its 'txid' in syslogs.

UI_a131_DisplayPortFailure.d: The AMD Ryzen Media Control Unit (MCU) is unable to communicate with the Display Port.
UI_a131_DisplayPortFailure.m: The center display may not function as expected. The center display may be blank or show artifacts present.

UI_a132_AdspWatchdogRecoveryTriggered.d: Adsp watchdog recovery has been triggered.

UI_a133_AdspWatchdogRecoveryFailed.d: Adsp watchdog encountered an error with recovery.

UI_a134_DashcamUsbDriveNoMedium.d: The USB Drive has experiened a no medium error.

UI_a137_ServiceShellActiveConnection.d: There is an active connection to service shell.

UI_a138_applyingConfigChange.d: System will reboot to apply configuration changes.

UI_a139_postponedConfigChange.d: Pending configuration changes will apply once the vehicle is parked.

UI_a140_NeverSleepActive.d: A data value in the UI prevents the vehicle from going to sleep and may lead to an increased rate of battery drain.
UI_a140_NeverSleepActive.m: Increased battery drain due to vehicle not sleeping.

UI_a141_falconDoorOpen.d: Falcon door open when gear is D/R/N. Triggers a continuous chime.
UI_a141_falconDoorOpen.m: Potential danger of open door whilst driving

UI_a142_CorrectableMemoryError.d: Correctable memory errors were reported by the memory controller.
UI_a142_CorrectableMemoryError.m: No impact to the customer as errors were correctable

UI_a143_FPSCrawling.d: Frame rate of the display is less than expected. UI may lag.
UI_a143_FPSCrawling.m: UI may appear to be laggy

UI_a144_nvmeWarning.d: Further diagnosis is required to determine the seriousness of these issues.
UI_a144_nvmeWarning.m: Degraded performance for the infotainment computer when reading/writing data to the NVMe storage device

UI_a145_nvmeUnsafeShutdown.d: NVMe storage device suffered abrupt loss of power on last boot.
UI_a145_nvmeUnsafeShutdown.m: Unsafe NVMe shutdowns carry risk of data loss or damage to storage device

UI_a146_nvmeNeedsReplacement.d: The NVMe storage device is not fully functional and needs the infotainment computer to be replaced.
UI_a146_nvmeNeedsReplacement.m: Poor customer experience with loss of various infotainment functionality

UI_a147_ASILGlobalError.d: The center display Automotive Safety Integrity Level (ASIL) register reports a non-zero status.
UI_a147_ASILGlobalError.m: Center display functionality may be unavailable.

UI_a149_DisplayCheckFailure.d: The User Interface (UI) Display Manager detects an error affecting the functionality of the center display.
UI_a149_DisplayCheckFailure.m: The center display may be blank, frozen, or unresponsive to touch inputs.

UI_a150_infoCPURunningHot.d: The infotainment processor is running hotter than the normal expected operating range.
UI_a150_infoCPURunningHot.m: Potentially degraded infotainment performance.  Touchscreen may be unavailable or may not function as expected.

UI_a152_infoThrottling.d: The infotainment CPU is limiting performance to adapt to power or temperature limitations.
UI_a152_infoThrottling.m: Potentially degraded infotainment performance.  Touchscreen may be unavailable or may not function as expected.

UI_a155_UsbFrontHubUnavailable.d: The front hub appears disconnected or powered off.
UI_a155_UsbFrontHubUnavailable.m: If the vehicle is awake and this alert is present, the hub may have faulted.

UI_a156_UsbFrontHubInstallMismatch.d: The front hub device has appeared on a vehicle where front hub data is configured as not available.
UI_a156_UsbFrontHubInstallMismatch.m: The UI experience and features may not match front hub capabilities.

UI_a157_MCUActiveCoolingRequested.d: MCU requires colder coolant to maintain functionality.
UI_a157_MCUActiveCoolingRequested.m: Reduced supercharging/HVAC performance and additional noise and vibrations

UI_a158_UsbDeviceMountError.d: A USB device has been inserted and an error occurred while mounting it.
UI_a158_UsbDeviceMountError.m: Unable to mount USB device filesystem

UI_a159_AudioHeartbeatFailure.d: The audio system is unreachable from the UI and is not responding to heartbeat requests.
UI_a159_AudioHeartbeatFailure.m: The audio system will not respond to commands and audio will be impacted.

UI_a161_ECallTemporarilyUnavailable.d: The car computer is unable to connect to the cellular modem, which may cause the emergency call (eCall) to become temporarily unavailable.

UI_a165_fsCorrupted.d: A filesystem consistency check on the infotainment system failed.
UI_a165_fsCorrupted.m: Loss of logs, profile settings, or other data stored on infotainment system

UI_a166_fsError.d: A post-boot filesystem error occurred at runtime.
UI_a166_fsError.m: Various UI errors, loss of logs, profile settings, or other data stored on infotainment system

UI_a167_CgroupOverMemKill.d: A process was killed by its cgroup for exceeding its memory limit.
UI_a167_CgroupOverMemKill.m: Various UI errors, including temporary blank screen until the process restarts

UI_a168_dgpuPowerOnSelfTestFailure.d: The Navi23 dGPU Failed its Power On Self Test. The dGPU is likely unoperational.
UI_a168_dgpuPowerOnSelfTestFailure.m: Discrete GPU and games will not be functional

UI_a176_CellularAntennaAlert.m: The cellular connection signal reception and data throughput may be reduced.

UI_a177_MediaPlayerFailure.d: The media player detects an error when playing a track from a media application. This may make the media player unable to play the track.
UI_a177_MediaPlayerFailure.m: The media player feature may be unavailable or may not function as expected.

UI_a178_irqDisabled.d: Kernel disabled an IRQ due to excessive spurious interrupt events.

UI_a179_TestDriveVideoDownloadFailure.d: Test Drive Mode video download failed.
UI_a179_TestDriveVideoDownloadFailure.m: Test Drive Mode welcome video will be unavailable.

UI_a180_AudiodInputRestarted.m: Audiod and vehicle audio may not function as expected.

UI_a181_ModemFirmwareVersionMismatch.d: Modem reported firmware version does not match the vehicle firmware version.
UI_a181_ModemFirmwareVersionMismatch.m: Potential loss of Cellular connectivity; On Telematics Control Unit (TCU), there may be also loss of Wifi and/or Bluetooth functionalities.

UI_a182_VideoPipelineOverrun.d: Infotainment camera video processing pipeline is unable to keep up with the incoming data rate from the camera's sensor or image source.
UI_a182_VideoPipelineOverrun.m: Infotainment camera video stream performance may be reduced.

UI_a183_DDAWFaulted.d: Driver Drowsiness and Attention Warning (DDAW) system is not operating as expected.

UI_a184_ISAFaulted.d: Intelligent Speed Assist (ISA) feature is not operating as expected.

UI_a188_TunerFirmwareMismatchedAPI.d: The radio tuner firmware expected a newer version of API for interacting with the tuner.
UI_a188_TunerFirmwareMismatchedAPI.m: The radio services on the MCU may have some issues communicating certain values provided by the tuner.

UI_a189_TunerWatchdogReset.d: The radio tuner recently performed a watchdog internal reset.
UI_a189_TunerWatchdogReset.m: During the watchdog reset, listening and radio controls would have been unavailable.

UI_a190_TunerMIA.d: The radio tuner appears to be MIA to the MCU and cannot issue commands.
UI_a190_TunerMIA.m: The tuner may be completely unreachable to the MCU, preventing any usage of the radio source.

UI_a191_TunerUpdateFailed.d: Tuner has failed to perform an OTA Update of the latest radio tuner firmware.
UI_a191_TunerUpdateFailed.m: The radio tuner may be unable to update to the latest firmware provided.

UI_a193_TcuRNandFwVersionMismatch.m: Telematics Control Unit (TCU) might not be recoverable if Primary Nand is not functioning as expected.

UI_a198_IncompatibleBTUSBHubHardware.d: The USB hub installed does not contain a Bluetooth module.
UI_a198_IncompatibleBTUSBHubHardware.m: Bluetooth headset feature might not function.

UI_a199_HighAPedalDetectedAtCollision.d: Accelerator pedal was deeply pressed at collision.

UI_a200_UIFirmwareVersionMismatch.m: A potential degradation of the User Interface (UI) experience or lack of communication between the UI and vehicle.

UI_a201_rearDisplayDisconnected.d: The Media Control Unit (MCU) does not detect a connection to the rear display.

UI_a204_ModemSleepFailure.d: The modem has failed to transition to suspended state.

UI_a213_ISADisabled.d: Intelligent Speed Assist (ISA) feature is disabled during this time.

UI_a216_AudioA2bCircuitProblem.d: Node and type of circuit problem.

UI_a223_databaseError.m: Impacts specific UI features dependent on the affected database.

UI_a224_centerDisplayDisconnected.d: The Media Control Unit (MCU) does not detect a connection to the center display.
UI_a224_centerDisplayDisconnected.m: The center display may not be powered or may not function as expected.

UI_a225_clusterDisplayDisconnected.d: The Media Control Unit (MCU) does not detect a connection to the instrument cluster display.

UI_a226_largePhoneContactSync.d: A phone contact sync with more than 5000 contacts completed. Alert payload contains the number of contacts loaded.

UI_a227_tplcMIA.d: The Trailer Power Line Communication (PLC) Electronic Control Unit (ECU) is MIA while in drive or accessory power state.

UI_a230_ModemSimCardMismatch.m: Unavailable 5G functionality on 5G vehicles with 4G SIM card installed. High subscription cost for 5G SIM card on a 4G vehicle.

UI_a233_ModemRFFailure.d: The cellular baseband Radio Frequency (RF) module did not initialize.

UI_a238_ModemConfigMismatch.m: Bluetooth features may be limited or unavailable.

VCBATT1_a497_LVBatteryWarnDisconnect.m: Disconnect low voltage battery to prevent overdischarge

VCBATT1_a548_HVFaultLoadShed.m: Vehicle loadshedding is triggered, and a separate alert will be present to indicate that condition and its impacts.

VCBATT1_a559_LVBatteryLowSOC.m: The LV battery may be unable to support vehicle electrical systems.

VCBATT_a370_noLVSupportSocTooLow.m: The LV battery may become completely discharged and unrecoverable, requiring replacement. It may be necessary to shed some vehicle electrical loads by

VCBATT_a388_shortedCell.m: The LV battery has at least one shorted cell, which could prevent it from adequately supporting the vehicle's electrical systems.

VCBATT_a392_airCompOutputStuckOn.m: The air compressor for the air suspension system is unavailable, making air suspension functionality limited or unavailable.

VCBATT_a477_LVBatteryUnrecoverableByVehi.m: The LV battery is not recoverable by the vehicle. If recovery via an external charger tool is unsuccessful, replacement will be necessary.

VCBATT_a479_LVBMS_ECPA_NotClosed.m: Connector on low voltage battery is not secured

VCBATT_a480_vnf1048Fault.d: There is an unexpected condition affecting a VNF1048 chip.

VCBATT_a488_mcuLogicEFuseFault.d: The MCU Logic eFuse has tripped.

VCBATT_a496_LVBatteryExitDriveWarning.m: Vehicle is preparing to shut down

VCBATT_a497_LVBatteryWarnDisconnect.m: Disconnect low voltage battery to prevent overdischarge

VCBATT_a548_HVFaultLoadShed.m: Vehicle loadshedding is triggered, and a separate alert will be present to indicate that condition and its impacts.

VCBATT_a555_LVBatteryCellRebalancing.m: The LV battery may suddenly become unavailable and unable to support vehicle electrical systems. The LV battery may require replacement, and a separat

VCBATT_a559_LVBatteryLowSOC.m: The LV battery may be unable to support vehicle electrical systems.

VCDOORFL_a150_windowPinch.m: Window will not complete actuation and reverse

VCDOORFL_a152_windowUncal.m: May short drop and reverse at all positions, no anti-pinch detection

VCDOORFL_a154_windowThermal.m: No user-initiated down/closing movement permitted in THERMAL_ALERT mode, no user-initiated movement permitted in THERMAL_CRITICAL mode

VCDOORFL_a156_windowNoInput.d: Window thermal protection mode is activated and user input was attempted, but blocked.
VCDOORFL_a156_windowNoInput.m: User commands for window open or all user commands are ignored (depending on which thermal protection mode is set) until window motor cools

VCDOORFL_a158_windowPinchOveride.d: Window pinch detection has been overriden by holding the auto-up window switch.
VCDOORFL_a158_windowPinchOveride.m: Window pinch detection is unavailable while the condition persists, as pinch detection is not enabled when overriden by holding the auto-up switch.

VCDOORFL_a160_windowUndercurrent.d: Window current is less than expected while the window is driven.
VCDOORFL_a160_windowUndercurrent.m: Window may not open or close as expected.

VCDOORFL_a162_windowEncoderStall.d: Window encoder ticks not seen while the front window motor is being driven: This suggests something is disconnected, shorted, or the controller voltage supply for the encoders is < 9V.
VCDOORFL_a162_windowEncoderStall.m: Window motor is possibly disconnected or shorted

VCDOORFL_a180_doorLatchRehome.d: The door latch had to be rehomed because of an unexpected movement in the latch's release motor.
VCDOORFL_a180_doorLatchRehome.m: Until this alert clears, the door latch may spontaneously release.

VCDOORFL_a182_emergencyLatchRel.d: The mechanical release was used to open the door.

VCDOORFL_a186_latchReleaseFailed.d: Door does not open when requested due to the latch not releasing when expected.

VCDOORFL_a188_latchUnableToRearm.d: Door latch release cam cannot find home position.
VCDOORFL_a188_latchUnableToRearm.m: Door may not be able to close

VCDOORFL_a202_IMUFaultDetected.d: The vehicle controller has detected a condition affecting Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) functionality, triggering the IMU recovery process.
VCDOORFL_a202_IMUFaultDetected.m: Vehicle functionality depending on the IMU may be limited or unavailable.

VCDOORFL_a286_windowSpeedInvalid.d: Window speed is too fast or in the wrong direction.

VCDOORFL_a310_mirrorFoldStall.d: Mirror stalled unexpectedly while folding or unfolding.
VCDOORFL_a310_mirrorFoldStall.m: Mirror might be halfway between folded and unfolded

VCDOORFL_a316_mirrorPrematureFoldStall.d: A side-view mirror started a fold or unfold movement, but then stalled before finishing the movement. The mirror will attempt 1 retry to complete the movement.
VCDOORFL_a316_mirrorPrematureFoldStall.m: The mirror will stop for 400ms before attempting the retry. If the mirror unexpectedly stalls again during the retry, it may be left partially folded/

VCDOORFL_a324_mirrorHeatFault.d: Mirror heat undercurrent detected, indicating mirror heating may be limited or unavailable.
VCDOORFL_a324_mirrorHeatFault.m: This alert is primarily informational and is used for logging purposes. No expected impact on vehicle functionality

VCDOORFL_a330_shortDropFailed.d: Window glass did not short drop while opening the door.
VCDOORFL_a330_shortDropFailed.m: Window glass is fully open. User may cause bright damage and experience difficulty closing the door if window is not lowered before closing.

VCDOORFL_a336_windowDropRevThermal.d: Window glass did not roll back up after closing the door.
VCDOORFL_a336_windowDropRevThermal.m: Window may be left slightly open.

VCDOORFL_a373_windowSwOpenReqInDogMode.d: Window switch open requests are ignored when Dog Mode is active to prevent pet escape.

VCDOORFL_a375_windowPinchOverrideNudge.d: Two window pinch events occured within 30 seconds of each other.
VCDOORFL_a375_windowPinchOverrideNudge.m: Window closing interrupted due to obstacle

VCDOORFL_a400_presenterUncal.m: Door will not present from the exterior button making it hard to open the door

VCDOORFL_a401_presenterUnknownBodyPositi.m: Door presenting will be slow from the exterior button

VCDOORFL_a402_presenterUnexpectedStop.d: Door presenter has stopped for unexpected reasons.
VCDOORFL_a402_presenterUnexpectedStop.m: Door presenter may require calibration or replacement.

VCDOORFL_a409_presenterStuckOut.d: Door presenter is stuck presented even through there is a valid retract request.
VCDOORFL_a409_presenterStuckOut.m: Door will get stuck open unless the presenter is physically back driven to fully retracted

VCDOORFL_a410_waitingForSoftStallTimeout.d: Presenter did not reach the soft stalling state within the allotted wait time.
VCDOORFL_a410_waitingForSoftStallTimeout.m: Door will not present, making it difficult to open.

VCDOORFL_a411_presenterDisconnected.d: Lack of current and encoder ticks from the presenter indicates it is no longer connected to the controlller.

VCDOORFL_a414_undervoltageSelfTestFailur.m: The vehicle may not allow drive or some loads may not turn on.
